name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Kansas City, MO's TitleMax Title Loans at 4100 Independence Ave offers fast title loans and payday advances with same-day funding.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans at 4100 Independence Ave in Kansas City, MO is a dedicated title loan and payday loan storefront open Monday through Saturday. The location operates from 9AM to 7PM on Mondays and Fridays, with reduced hours Tuesday through Thursday (9AM-6PM) and Saturday (9AM-4PM), closed Sundays.

At this Kansas City location, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral, with same-day approval and funding available. The store also offers payday advances for those who need quick cash. Contact the Kansas City branch at 816-241-0829 to discuss loan options, eligibility requirements, and the specific terms available for your situation.

If you're a Kansas City, MO resident needing emergency funds, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title if applying for a title loan. TitleMax specializes in getting you money fast when traditional lenders won't.
pros: Same-day cash funding for approved applicants
Accepts most credit types; credit score is not the primary qualification factor
Keep driving your vehicle while using it as collateral for title pledges
Established local presence in Memphis since February 2007
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended hours including evening and weekend availability
5.0/5 star average rating across 481+ Google reviews with specific staff recommendations
Flexible line of credit option allowing incremental draws up to credit limit
cons: Title loans carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans and personal loans
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are defaulted
Specific APR rates and fees are not disclosed on the website
Available only in 11 states; geographic limitations outside service areas
Requires clear vehicle title as collateral, limiting access for those with outstanding loans against their vehicles
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Vehicle owners with clear titles facing unexpected expenses and limited traditional borrowing options
People in Memphis and surrounding areas who prefer in-person loan processing
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area residents facing genuine financial emergencies who have a clear vehicle title and need cash within 24 hours, particularly those with poor credit who lack traditional lending options. The critical caveat is that title loans charge significantly higher interest rates than alternatives and carry repossession risk, making them suitable only for short-term emergency use, not ongoing financial needs.
services: Title Pledge loans secured by vehicle title
Flex Line of Credit (secured by vehicle title with flexible draw options)
Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit for qualifying applicants
Credit evaluation (despite accepting most credit types)
Customer account management portals (separate for title loans vs. personal loans)
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 4100 Independence Ave, Kansas City, MO. Same-day title loans and payday advances for Kansas City residents.
